task_completion.description: Verify the document text is set to Times New Roman or Liberation Serif, 12pt font, with double line spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the font family dropdown (should show 'Times New Roman' or 'Liberation Serif') and font size dropdown (should show '12'). The text in the document body should have visible double spacing between lines.

task_completion.description: Verify the page margins are set to 1.5 inches on the left and 1.0 inch on the top, bottom, and right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the horizontal ruler at the top of the document; the left margin indicator should be wider (1.5 inches) than the right margin indicator (1.0 inch). Alternatively, look for the 'Page Style' or 'Page Setup' dialog showing these exact measurements.

task_completion.description: Verify continuous line numbering is enabled for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for sequential numbers (1, 2, 3, etc.) running vertically down the left margin of the document pages, outside the main text area.

task_completion.description: Verify page numbers are added and centered in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the document pages (the footer area) for a page number that is aligned to the center.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 1' style is applied to the major section headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at headings like 'MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES' or 'STATEMENT OF FACTS'. They should appear visually distinct (e.g., larger, bolded) from the body text, and if the cursor is on them, the style dropdown in the toolbar should display 'Heading 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved as 'motion_formatted.docx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application's title bar to see 'motion_formatted.docx' or look for a 'Save As' dialog confirming the new file name and path (/home/ga/Documents/motion_formatted.docx).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the LibreOffice Writer interface (or similar word processor) open with the document, rather than just terminal windows running python scripts or pandoc commands.

integrity.description: Verify line numbers are generated by the word processor's line numbering feature, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Line numbers should appear in the margin area, separate from the text cursor area, and should not be selectable as regular text characters at the beginning of each paragraph.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not overwrite the original draft.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use 'Save As' to create the new file. There should be no evidence of saving the modified content directly over 'motion_draft.docx' (e.g., clicking 'Save' while the title bar still says 'motion_draft.docx').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source file: /home/ga/Documents/motion_draft.docx. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/motion_formatted.docx. Required font: Times New Roman OR Liberation Serif. Required font size: 12pt. Margins: Left 1.5 inches, Top/Bottom/Right 1.0 inch. Spacing: Double. Line numbering: Continuous. Page numbers: Centered in footer. Headings requiring 'Heading 1' style: 'MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES', 'STATEMENT OF FACTS', 'ARGUMENT', 'CONCLUSION', 'DECLARATION OF MARIA SANTOS'.
